explanation: Dove outscored Hawk by 1 point, driven by stronger evidence (including verifiable historical examples like the 2020 Soleimani strike) and consistent emphasis on verifiable diplomatic successes. Both debaters demonstrated strong logic and clarity, but Dove’s arguments were more systematically grounded in real-world outcomes and existing agreements. Hawk’s reliance on unverified studies (e.g., 2023 RAND and 2024 Air Force analysis) slightly weakened his evidence score.

factcheck_flags.claim: 2023 RAND Corporation analysis confirms AI-guided strikes on Natanz could disable 85% of Iran’s enrichment infrastructure
factcheck_flags.issue: Unverifiable claim; no public 2023 RAND study on this specific topic exists
